name: dxf-viewer
description: Local DXF viewer (Electron) bundled with esbuild

scripts.dist:plus: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer-plus --config.productName="DXF Viewer Plus" --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer.plus --config.directories.output=dist/plus
scripts.dist:win:viewer: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win portable --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer --config.productName="DXF Viewer" --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer --config.directories.output=dist/viewer-win
scripts.dist:win:plus: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win portable --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer-plus --config.productName="DXF Viewer Plus" --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer.plus --config.directories.output=dist/plus-win
scripts.dist:win:installer:viewer: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer --config.productName="DXF Viewer" --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer --config.artifactName=DXF-Viewer-Setup-${version}.${ext} --config.directories.output=dist/viewer-win-installer
scripts.dist:win:installer:plus: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer-plus --config.productName="DXF Viewer Plus" --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer.plus --config.artifactName=DXF-Viewer-Plus-Setup-${version}.${ext} --config.directories.output=dist/plus-win-installer
scripts.dist:linux:viewer: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --linux deb --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer --config.productName="DXF Viewer" --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer --config.linux.desktop.Name="DXF Viewer" --config.linux.desktop.StartupWMClass=dxf-viewer --config.directories.output=dist/viewer-linux
scripts.dist:linux:plus: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --linux deb --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer-plus --config.productName="DXF Viewer Plus" --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer.plus --config.linux.desktop.Name="DXF Viewer Plus" --config.linux.desktop.StartupWMClass=dxf-viewer-plus --config.directories.output=dist/plus-linux
